entity.label: Plain of Aven
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: In Amos 1:5 it denotes the Syrian Heliopolis, the modern Baalbec.

nodes.label: Plain of Aven
nodes.description: In Amos 1:5 it denotes the Syrian Heliopolis, the modern Baalbec.

verses.text: I will break also the bar of Damascus, and cut off the inhabitant from the plain of Aven, and him that holdeth the sceptre from the house of Eden: and the people of Syria shall go into captivity unto Kir, saith the LORD.
